subcodes.first_line: O compassionate God! Make this new rosebud from the garden of love fresh and verdant through the dewdrops of Thy grace, and this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خدای مهربان این نوگل گلستان محبت را از شبنم عنایت تر و تازه بفرما و این
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for children and youth, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @prayer for prosperity
